fix: inflection detection uses per-set 1RM instead of curve concavity

The old detect_inflection() checked if the mathematical curve shape
(gamma) was concave, which always returned inflecting=True for gamma<1
regardless of actual user performance. This meant exercises were marked
complete even when the user was getting MORE reps at higher weight.

New approach computes per-set 1RM via Brzycki formula from raw
(weight, reps, RPE) data. If the last set's estimated 1RM is lower
than the previous set's, fatigue is showing. Otherwise the user
still has headroom and should do another set.

commit.message:
fix: use TextEncoder for empty file SHA-256 test (cross-realm fix)

jsdom creates ArrayBuffer in its own realm, which Node's
crypto.subtle.digest rejects on Linux. Using TextEncoder.encode('')
produces a native-realm buffer that works cross-platform.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: prescription race condition and exercise restore on tab switch

Bug 1: Exercise list lost on tab switch — simplified restore logic to
use plan exercises directly instead of fetching workout session sets.
Plan exercises now include allow_heavy_loading from backend.

Bug 2: Prescription never renders — replaced useEffect with cancelled
flag pattern with ref-guarded fetch. The old pattern set prescribing:true
which flipped needsPrescription to false, triggering cleanup that
cancelled the in-flight fetch. New approach uses fetchingRef to prevent
duplicate fetches without dependency cycle.

refactor: active-only widget registration and fix FakePlayer overflow

Tab switching no longer accumulates all tabs' buttons in the screen widget
list with visibility flags. Only the current tab's buttons are registered.

Changes in CommandGUIScreen:
- Add addTabButtons(Tab) / removeTabButtons(Tab): register/unregister only
  the given tab's buttons - no visibility flags needed
- Add updateTabDependentWidgets(Tab): manage search/add/close button visibility
- Remove syncButtonsToScreen(), global removeTabButtons(), and 6 per-tab
  helpers (removeCustomTabButtons, addCustomTabButtons, removePresetTabButtons,
  addPresetTabButtons, syncFakePlayerActionButtons, refreshFakePlayerTab)
- Simplify tick(), mouseScrolled(), onSearchChanged(), repositionElements(),
  refresh(), and mouseClicked() to use the new targeted helpers

Changes in FakePlayerTab:
- Add rebuildPlayerButtons(): only creates buttons for visible rows,
  fixing the overflow rendering and off-screen clickable buttons bug
- Add setOnRebuild(before, after): unified before/after callback for all
  button rebuilds (scroll, search, player select)
- Remove oldActionButtons / oldBatchButtons and their getters
- Simplify renderFaces() to use cached playerListX field
